name: Copilot Hub Full Icon Set

icons.label: Hub
icons.description: Primary Copilot Hub mark with connected diamond agents.

icons.label: Agents
icons.description: Agent/person glyph for managing copilot agents.

icons.label: Create
icons.description: Plus glyph for creating agents and workflows.

icons.label: Explore
icons.description: Compass glyph for browsing and discovering agents.

icons.label: Chat
icons.description: Conversation bubble glyph for chat experiences.

icons.label: Analytics
icons.description: Bar chart glyph for metrics, telemetry, and insights.

icons.label: Automations
icons.description: Lightning glyph for automations and triggers.

icons.label: Integrations
icons.description: Plug glyph for connectors and integrations.

icons.label: Tools
icons.description: Wrench glyph for agent tools and actions.

icons.label: Settings
icons.description: Gear-like glyph for configuration and settings.

icons.label: Security
icons.description: Shield-check glyph for policy, governance, and security.

icons.label: Users
icons.description: Group glyph for users and teams.

icons.label: Notifications
icons.description: Bell glyph for notifications and alerts.

notes: Module icons use the supplied Copilot Hub SVG frame and a centered module glyph.
The current-color variant is intended for CSS-driven UI usage.
The symbol sprite uses currentColor and can be embedded inline in HTML or React.
